ksa_text: Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including stakeholder interviews, artifact review, maturity scoring, and finding synthesis.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-S-006 (LS, Skill) maps to Clinical Data Manager scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5294 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.529, eu_ai_act=0.472, ddat=0.439. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within clinical data management, regulatory compliance, and healthcare analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA LS-S-006 with composite 0.5294 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5294 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the LS domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. LS domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5294 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-S-006 (composite 0.5294) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5294 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Clinical Data Manager at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.5294 is not a standard requirement for Clinical Data Manager at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5294, domain LS. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
